compiled_state.title: Delete orphan: rebar_reconciler/verify-gha-runner.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
dso CI-runner verifier; falls back to a 'dso' binary (line ~22 REBAR_CMD="dso"). Evidence: zero inbound references; .github/workflows contains only release.yml which does not mention it. A rebar CI preflight would be rewritten for rebar CI anyway.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git rm src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/verify-gha-runner.sh
- [ ] Full suite green

comments.body: Done in commit 39dbfba. Full suite 1300 passed / 2 xfailed; targeted bash suites for touched scripts green.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
